events.title: Texas America250
events.description: As the country celebrates 250 years since the signing of the Declaration of Independence, every state has a story to tell about its own contributions to the development of the nation. events.title: The Golden Age of the Jews of Al-Andalus | La Edad de Oro de los judíos de Alandalús
events.description: Explore a time where diversity was our strength. Discover the unique 10th-12th century Andalusi period where Muslims, Jews, and Christians created a flourishing culture of art, philosophy, and science. events.title: Through a Diamond: Celebrating the Legacy of Japanese American Baseball
events.description: The National Japanese American Baseball Exhibit is created by a partnership between the Japanese American Citizens League (JACL) and the Nisei Baseball Research Project. events.title: Color Splash Playdate Tuesdays
events.description: Join us for a vibrant journey into the world of colors! A hands-on, sensory-rich experience designed especially for the little ones! Dates/times vary. Click for details!

events.title: EastArts Workshop Series 1: Japanese Stencil Dyeing - Ise Katagami
events.description: Join us for EastArts, a vibrant workshop series that immerses kids in the captivating traditions and creative expressions of East Asian arts and craft techniques! Dates and times vary!

events.title: EastArts Workshop Series 2: Planet Earth Scrap Sticker Lab
events.description: Join us for EastArts, a vibrant workshop series that immerses kids in the captivating traditions and creative expressions of East Asian arts and craft techniques! Dates and times vary!

events.title: In the Community: Basics Houston Fun*Shops

events.title: Kaleidoscope Colloquiums
events.description: Discover our newest exhibit, Faithful Friends, with fun and engaging programming that inspire children to ask questions and learn about the diverse world of faith, beliefs, culture, and friendship!

events.title: STEM Bites for Little Learners: Build a Boat Challenge
events.description: Get ready for some hands-on science fun with planting daisy seeds while understanding how living things grow!

events.title: Storytime, Sing, Move and Play!
events.description: Discover rhythm, melody, and movement with fun, hands-on music games inspired by famous operas. Kids will explore creativity and build a lasting love for the arts! Dates/times vary. Click for details!

events.title: Yoga for Little Learners
events.description: Yoga for Little Learners is a playful and calming yoga session designed for young children through gentle movement, imaginative storytelling and more!

events.description: Created by Zumba, get ready for some original music and movement to promote all your toddlers' developmental skills! Dates and times vary. Click for details!

events.title: Get Crafty: Kids Craft Time at the Library!
events.description: Unleash your creativity at our Kids Craft program! Join us for a fun and imaginative crafting session where children ages 5-10 can create exciting projects to take home and show off. events.title: Board Games at the Library
events.description: Rediscover the joy of board games at the library! Whether you love classic games, card games, or party games, there's something for everyone. Gather your friends, family, or fellow game lovers for an afternoon of fun and friendly competition. Register now and get ready for a game-filled time.

events.title: Build and Create: Join Our LEGO Club at the Library!

events.title: Summer Kick-Off Party!
events.description: We’re kicking off summer with a bang — and a whole lot of confetti. Every weekend brings a new way to play, and this is your all-access pass to the fun!

events.title: Bring Your Family to Storytime!
events.description: Join us for Family Storytime, where we bring books to life through stories, songs, and activities that everyone in the family will enjoy! This interactive event encourages a love of reading and is perfect for families. events.description: Join us every week for a lively, all-ages celebration that brings families together for creativity, entertainment, and hands-on fun! Each Saturday features a new family-friendly movie along with engaging activities like crafts, LEGO building, and more. events.description: These bilingual workshops are designed to engage young learners in the joy of reading and writing through hands-on activities, stories, and interactive exercises.

events.description: It’s time to press play on play as we power up for a full day of fun at the Museum! From games to creativity to power play, there’s something for everyone. Can you come out to play?!

events.title: Bank of America Museums on Us®
events.description: Bank of America invites cardholders to receive free general admission to more than 225 cultural institutions in dozens of cities across the US, including Children's Museum Houston!

events.description: Join us for EastArts, a vibrant workshop series that immerses kids in the captivating traditions and creative expressions of East Asian arts and craft techniques! Dates and times vary!

events.description: ExxonMobil turns every second Thursday of the month into a thrilling free evening adventure! Free Family Night hours are from 5 pm to 8 pm!

events.description: Rewind & Play is the Children’s Museum Houston’s signature adults‑only night—where growing up takes a backseat and play takes over!
